app.name: CodeScope
app.tagline: Understand your AI-generated code, step by step
app.description: Paste AI-generated Python code and watch it execute step-by-step with animated variable state. See which branches fire, which variables change, and why.

hero.title: See exactly what your AI-generated code does
hero.subtitle: Paste code. Watch it run. Understand why it works.
hero.demo_placeholder: Paste your AI-generated Python code here

features.title: Built for the AI code comprehension gap

items.title: Step-by-step execution
items.description: Watch your code execute line by line with variable state that updates in real time.

items.title: Branch detection
items.description: See exactly which if/else branch fired and why, not just that a line executed.

items.title: Contextual explanations
items.description: Ask "Why is this here?" and get an answer grounded in the actual execution state.

items.title: Spaced repetition review
items.description: Save traces to your review queue. CodeScope schedules reviews so you retain what you learn.

tracer.placeholder: Paste your AI-generated Python code here
tracer.traceTooltip: Execute and visualize this code step by step

sideEffectWarning.title: Code blocked for safety
sideEffectWarning.message: This code contains potentially dangerous operations that CodeScope cannot safely execute.
sideEffectWarning.details: CodeScope executes code in a sandboxed environment. The following patterns are blocked: file operations, network calls, subprocess execution, and dynamic code execution.

errors.timeout: Execution timed out after 5 seconds. This may be an infinite loop.

review.title: Review Queue
review.empty: No reviews due. Trace some code to build your queue.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.notFound: This trace doesn't exist or has been removed.
